title: 💻 Claude Code: CLAUDE.md Best Practices - UX Planet
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

## UX Planet. ## 10 Sections to Include in your CLAUDE.md. `CLAUDE.md` is a critical file for providing project-specific context to Claude Code. Whenever Claude’s AI model writes new or modifies existing code in your project, the first thing it will do is check the Claude.md file. In this article, I will share everything you need to know to craft a great `CLAUDE.md` file and streamline your coding process. `CLAUDE.md` file is typically placed in the root of the project repository. Anthropic’s docs say `CLAUDE.md` is part of Claude Code’s project memory, loaded at the start of each conversation, and that Claude treats it as *context rather than hard enforcement.*. Although every project is different, and it’s impossible to provide a one-size-fits-all structure for `CLAUDE.md` file, it is still possible to name 10 key sections that will be relevant to most projects:. If you’re new to Medium, create a new account to read this story on us. ## Published in UX Planet.

title: 💻 Mastering the Vibe: Claude Code Best Practices That Actually Work
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# Mastering the Vibe: Claude Code Best Practices That Actually Work. If you’re ready to move beyond the “ask and pray” approach to something that actually works consistently, here’s what I’ve learned about making Claude Code genuinely useful. But the real power comes from asking Claude to make a plan before coding and explicitly telling it not to code until you’ve confirmed that its plan looks good. The biggest mental shift for me was stopping thinking of Claude Code as a tool and starting to think of it as a junior developer who’s incredibly fast but needs good direction. After implementing these practices consistently, my Claude Code sessions became dramatically more predictable and useful. Plan first, think appropriately hard, collaborate actively, and teach Claude about your specific context through .claude files. ## I Stopped Vibe Coding and Started “Prompt Contracts” — Claude Code Went From Gambling to Shipping. ### Anthropic just launched their Claude Code in Action course, and I’ve just passed — how about you?

content:

| [**Voice Dictation**](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/voice-dictation)[![Image 53: beta](https://github.com/shanraisshan/claude-code-best-practice/raw/main/!/tags/beta.svg)](https://github.com/shanraisshan/claude-code-best-practice/blob/main/!/tags/beta.svg) | `/voice` | [![Image 54: Best Practice](https://github.com/shanraisshan/claude-code-best-practice/raw/main/!/tags/best-practice.svg)](https://x.com/trq212/status/2028628570692890800) Push-to-talk speech input for prompts with 20-language support and rebindable activation key |. | always start with [plan mode](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/common-workflows) | [![Image 124: Boris](https://github.com/shanraisshan/claude-code-best-practice/raw/main/!/tags/boris-cherny.svg)](https://x.com/bcherny/status/2007179845336527000) |. | use [test time compute](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/sub-agents) — separate context windows make results better; one agent can cause bugs and another (same model) can find them | [![Image 140: Boris](https://github.com/shanraisshan/claude-code-best-practice/raw/main/!/tags/boris-cherny.svg)](https://x.com/bcherny/status/2031151689219321886) |. | use [commands](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/slash-commands) for your workflows instead of [sub-agents](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/sub-agents) | [![Image 142: Boris](https://github.com/shanraisshan/claude-code-best-practice/raw/main/!/tags/boris-cherny.svg)](https://x.com/bcherny/status/2007179847949500714) |. | use [slash commands](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/slash-commands) for every "inner loop" workflow you do many times a day — saves repeated prompting, commands live in `.claude/commands/` and are checked into git | [![Image 143: Boris](https://github.com/shanraisshan/claude-code-best-practice/raw/main/!/tags/boris-cherny.svg)](https://x.com/bcherny/status/2007179847949500714) |. | skills are folders, not files — use references/, scripts/, examples/ subdirectories for [progressive disclosure](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/skills) | [![Image 147: Thariq](https://github.com/shanraisshan/claude-code-best-practice/raw/main/!/tags/thariq.svg)](https://x.com/trq212/status/2033949937936085378) |. | use [/code-review](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/code-review) for multi-agent PR analysis — catches bugs, security vulnerabilities, and regressions before merge | [![Image 173: Boris](https://github.com/shanraisshan/claude-code-best-practice/raw/main/!/tags/boris-cherny.svg)](https://x.com/bcherny/status/2031089411820228645) |.

title: 💻 Claude Code Batch Processing Complete Guide - SmartScope
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# Claude Code Batch Processing Complete Guide: /batch Command and Headless Mode in Practice¶. The `/batch` command in Claude Code shines when you need to apply the same transformation across hundreds of files. | Aspect | /batch Command | Headless Mode (claude -p) |. `/batch` is a slash command executed within an interactive Claude Code session1. ## Headless Mode (claude -p): CI/CD and Script Integration¶. claude -p "Summarize this file" --output-format text. claude -p "Process this large dataset" --output-format stream-json`. claude -p "Analyze this code" --output-format json | jq -r '.result'. claude -p "Summarize this file" --output-format json | jq '.usage'`. session_id=$(claude -p "Start review" --output-format json \. claude -p "Continue the review" --resume "$session_id"`. claude -p "Review the code" \. - claude -p "Analyze maintainability issues" --output-format json. - claude -p "Check for performance bottlenecks" --output-format json. Claude Code's batch processing is built on two pillars: `/batch` and headless mode (`claude -p`). Claude Code v2.1.63 Release Notes — `/batch` and `/simplify` were introduced in this version.

content:
Claude Code 技术干货

Batch Processing Skill for Claude Code | Scale AI Workflows. # Batch Processing. Optimizes large-scale task execution through agent swarms, API batch processing, and intelligent loops to maximize efficiency and reduce costs. The Batch Processing skill for Claude Code empowers developers to handle high-volume tasks—such as reviewing dozens of files or processing hundreds of documents—without linear increases in time or token costs. It provides a strategic framework for selecting the optimal execution method based on scale: utilizing agent swarms for rapid parallel processing of 5-20 items, the Anthropic API Batch for 50% cost savings on massive datasets, or sequential loops for tasks with complex dependencies. This skill ensures your AI-driven workflows are scalable, cost-effective, and highly structured. 02Sequential Workflow Management for dependent item processing. 04Comprehensive Decision Tree for choosing optimal processing methods. 05Agent Swarm Parallelization for rapid multi-file processing. 06API Batch Integration for 50% cost reduction on high-volume tasks. 03Processing hundreds of documentation files or logs using the cost-optimized API Batch.

title: 💻 Claude Code /simplify and /batch Commands Guide
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# Claude Code /simplify and /batch: Bundled Commands That Ship Code Faster. Claude Code /simplify runs 3-agent code review on your changes. Boris Cherny, the Claude Code PM, put it well: these bundled commands "automate much of the work it used to take to shepherd a pull request to production." `/simplify` is the automated code review step between "it works" and "it's ready to merge.". Claude Code's `/batch` command orchestrates large-scale changes across your codebase in parallel. Each `/batch` worker automatically runs `/simplify` on its own changes before committing. `/simplify` and `/batch` are bundled Claude Code commands -- they ship with every installation and work out of the box. `/simplify` and `/batch` shipped in Claude Code v2.1.63. `/simplify` and `/batch` signal where Claude Code is headed: bundled multi-agent workflows that handle common engineering patterns out of the box. If you want a development framework with pre-built agent orchestration, custom slash commands, and multi-agent patterns that work alongside these bundled commands, the ClaudeFast Code Kit ships with 18 specialized agents and a pipeline designed for exactly this kind of workflow.
